name: Fresh Fruit Frappe
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the watermelon into cubes.
2. Cut the cantaloupe or honeydew into cubes.
3. Cut the pineapple into cubes.
4. Cube the mango.
5. Halve the strawberries.
6. Combine all ingredients in a blender with orange juice and sugar.
7. Blend until smooth.
8. Serve over crushed ice.
